description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this summery dress. Wear it with a pair of strappy flat sandals for a trip to a cafe or a day out at the mall. Product Details Printed sleeveless dress with pink lace detailing at the back yoke and shoulders, has a square neckline with a dip at the centre, pink embroidered panels on the sides from the underarms to the waist in front and below the lace detail to the waist at the back, elastication at the back and sides at the waist, a mock half buttoned placket in front and lace detail in the skirt region and hemline Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 90 cm from shoulder to hem
